scenarios.description: clone() copies a non-null connection field so that clone.connection() returns the same Connection instance
scenarios.precondition: Document has a custom Connection set via connection(Connection)
scenarios.expectedResult: clone.connection() returns the same Connection instance that was on the original
pseudocode: TEST TC11 clone preserves connection field

scenarios.description: clone() copies attributes on the Document root element via the attribute-copy loop
scenarios.precondition: Document root has one attribute set
scenarios.expectedResult: clone().attr("data-key") equals the original value and clone is distinct
pseudocode: TEST TC12 clone copies root attributes
